creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Been scp-ing a 127MB file over rtw89 and got firmware errors.
Despite that the file did arrive intact (checksum was okay).

We'll need to find a way to find some sense in all of this. 

This is on Linux v6.11 with 8852ae and fw 0.13.36.0 (c33d3f88)
